text:
This is but one of the legends of which the people speak...

Long ago, there existed a country where a golden power lay hidden. It was a prosperous land blessed with Kangaroos,  hoodoos, and peace.

But one day, a man of Great Evil, clothed in blue found the golden power and took it for himself. With its strength at his command, he spread darkness across the country. But then, when all hope had died, and the hour of doom seemed at hand...

...a heroic team clothed in Red appeared as if from nowhere. Wielding the weapons of evil's bane they sealed the dark one away and gave the land light.

This team, who traveled across the land to save it, were known as the Heroes of Team. The team's tale was passed down through generations until it became legend... But then, a day came when a fell wind began to blow across the country. The great evil that all thought had been forever sealed away by the team once again crept forth from the depths of the earth, eager to resume its dark designs.

The people believed that the Heroes of Team would again come to save them... But the team did not appear. Faced by an onslaught of evil, the people could do nothing but appeal to their god, Saxton Hale. In their last hour, as doom drew nigh, they left their future in the hands of fate.

What became of that country?  None remain who know.

The memory of the Country vanished, but its legend survived on the wind's breath. In a certain town, it became customary to garb groups in red when they came of age. Clothed in the red of fires, they aspired to find heroic weapons and cast down evil. The elders wished only for the youths to know teamwork like the heroes of legend.

(editing a legend is kinda hard sometimes.)

text:
Pyro was on BLU. Simple as that.

The demo was harmed greatly early in battle... even after healing, he refused to fight; his team was failing greatly, and he refused to lose any more honor to BLU. Finally, he lost hope in his team near the end of the fight. The soldier... once retired, was fighting to avenge the demo... But after hearing his treason went on a rampage to kill the man he thought was his greatest (and only) friend.

Heavy laid down his gun for RED and switched teams. The scout and sniper showed him no mercy for this act of treason.

text:
Their allies fallen to the wrath of the BLU army, the REDs have to press on with the sole survivors of the Scout, Sniper, Soldier, Engineer and the Heavy. They could only help but pray that Saxton Hale was on their side, as it is their destiny to defeat the BLUs, and save 2Fort. They are... The Legendary Team.

Edit: I know the Demoman and the Pyro are in this video, but I didn't include them for two reasons:
The Demoman would have become severely depressed due to the loss of his other comerades, and went alone to attack the BLUs. He never returned.
And the Pyro was blown up. Simple as that.

text: This is a tale of a young scout. He lived on a peaceful island, and it is his birthday, so he got clothes like the legendary hero's. His sister got kidnapped by the evil heavy, so the scout set out to destroy the evil fiend. He went through many tiring and deadly dungeons. Eventually, he found the legendary master bat, and cast down the evil heavy and sealed him away forever. The tale of the scout was passed down for centuries, until it became legend.
author: @SirWalruston

The Legend of Scout.
Hero of Bonk

The Hero of Team Hyrule. With his Master Bat, the Scout delivered the Bane of Evil to the evil forces of Heavy. Heavy's Sandvich of power made him the most formidable wielder of Sasha. But with Scout's Bonk of Courage, he had delivered the final blow on Heavy with the help of the Sniper's Jarate of Wisdom. He has been written down in history as the Hero of Bonk, and the savior of Team Hyrule.

text:
The great Heavy that all thought had been bonked forever sealed away by the Scout...

Once again crept forth from the depths of the BLU Spawn, eager to resume it's dark pwning.

The REDS believed that the Hero of Bonk would come again to help them.

But the Scout did not appear...

Faced by an onslaught of bullets, the REDS could do nothing but appeal to the announcer.

In their last second, as failure drew nigh, they left their victory in the hands of HAX.
author: @KingGekko

text:
A young Scout clothed in RED appeared as if from spawn.

Wielding the bat of evil's bonk, he pwned the Heavy away and brought the REDS boink.

This Scout, who traveled though people to save the land, was known has the Hero of Bonk.

The scout's tale was passed down though the Forums, until it became epicer.

But then...a day came when a fell wind of bullets began to blow across the Point.
author: @KingGekko

text:
"Long ago, there existed a fortress where a golden intellegence lay hidden. 

It was a prosperous land blessed with Lvl3 Sentries, dispensers, and peace.

But one day, a Heavy of great evil found the intellegence and took it for himself...

With its Natascha at his command, he spread darkness across the REDS.

But then, when all Medics had died, and the 60 seconds of doom seemed at hand...
